title: Better TFC Anvil GUI
description: A pixel ruler for TerraFirmaCraft's Anvil GUI.
body:
# Better TFC Anvil GUI

This is a really simple resource pack that helps you line up the marker in TerraFirmaCraft's anvil GUI. It also fixes the issue where the red and green markers don't point to the correct pixel.

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XpiWO3Gy/images/f6faac78b43b159dd0c93784599926dddd883bb1.png)

I originally made this for personal use, but figured it's worth sharing. Feel free to use anywhere.

_To the TFC dev team: please let me know if you want me to take this down._
